node.data: {"M8376":{"lit":"համբե<lb xml:id=\"l104229532\" facs=\"#z104229532\" n=\"8\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>րեցէք","line":{"facs":"#z104229531","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104229531","n":"7"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8376-012b"},"n":"համբերեցէք"},"V1294":{"lit":"համբերեցէք","line":{"facs":"#z104423522","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104423522","n":"17"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"9093 copy"},"n":"համբերեցէք"},"M691":{"lit":"համբերեցէք","line":{"facs":"#z104011501","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104011501","n":"25"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"691-136a"},"n":"համբերեցէք"},"M7032":{"lit":"համբերեցէք","line":{"facs":"#z103991792","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103991792","n":"12"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"7032-034b"},"n":"համբերեցէք"},"M8076":{"lit":"համբերեցէք","line":{"facs":"#z104100466","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104100466","n":"11"},"column":{"n":"1"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8076.0359"},"n":"համբերեցէք"},"M695":{"lit":"համբերեցէք","line":{"facs":"#z103914796","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l103914796","n":"4"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"695-299b"},"n":"համբերեցէք"},"M892":{"lit":"համբերեցէք","line":{"facs":"#z104346399","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104346399","n":"10"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"892-188b"},"n":"համբերեցէք"},"M6712":{"lit":"հա<lb xml:id=\"l104385093\" facs=\"#z104385093\" n=\"16\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>մբերեցէք","line":{"facs":"#z104385092","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104385092","n":"15"},"column":{"n":"1"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"6712-123a"},"n":"համբերեցէք"},"M9307":{"lit":"համբերեցէք","context":"text/body/ab[23]","n":"համբերեցէք"},"M7227":{"lit":"համբերեցէք","line":{"facs":"#z103958329","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103958329","n":"16"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"7227-013b"},"n":"համբերեցէք"}}
